meta.poznamky: Student musí nakreslit 2 čtverce 60px s 40px mezerou. penUp při přesunu.

cms.task_text: Nakreslete [hlp]dva čtverce o straně 60 bodů[/hlp] vedle sebe s mezerou 40 bodů. Mezera = pero nekreslí.
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="controls_repeat_ext"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
